claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: "Snorkel helps frontier labs and AI teams develop specialized training data and environments that set their models and agents apart."

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
Documentation or live demo accessible without login
Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Our cloud and technology partners expand our platform’s interoperability within the modern ML stack, offering our Fortune 500 and government customers with seamless and security connections.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Snorkel's proprietary process is built around the decisions that determine whether training data actually drives model improvement: Calibrated expert review, Rubrics and programmatic checks, Well-specified expert-level tasks, Adjudication and provenance.
